name: phillo-study
description: Turn a med-school week's lectures into the right AnKing Step Deck cards and a paced study plan. Bring your own AnKing deck and study resource.

plugins.name: anki-week
plugins.description: Build a week's AnKing Step Deck from your lecture materials — unsuspend + tag cards, one filtered deck per lecture, coverage audit. Requires Anki desktop + the Anki MCP Server add-on (124672614).

plugins.name: study-week
plugins.description: Plan the week's study TIME around your decks: map lectures to videos, reserve Anki review time, and stage pre-lecture blocks into your calendar as proposed events.
